'''''Del''''' was a group of 3 [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Transport/Legends|Transports]] ''Del'' were a part of an assault on [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. With the combined effort of starfighters from [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'' and Imperial Aces such as [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], the rebel attack failed, and the ''Del'' group was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
